case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL VS. PETER JOSEPH LANA et al

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-11-2003 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an opposition filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez. (212)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-11-2003 Continued To Sep-09-03 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Appearance for plaintiff. The OSC is re-set to 9/9/2003 at 10:00 a.m., in department 212. Proceedings reported by: Margaret Del Coto, CSR #8493. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-20-2003 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Jun-10-03 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Appearance for plaintiff. Case recalled at end of calendar; plaintiff's counsel requested matter be set to CRC225 6/10/2003 at 10:00AM in Dept. 212 for dismissal. Proceedings reported by Mitch Lyon. (212)
